messages.content: One stop solution for all your requirement
One stop solution for all your requirement

Any one require E-pan card connect with me @ 9903291262. You can only apply this when your aadhar no is linked with mobile no. After application you can get it within 24 hours...       
                                                                                In order to expand Business U must have GST...?Don't u need
We would like to inform you that due to this pandemic situation we are providing GST and MSME Registration for nominal charges. There are no hidden charges. 

                            Services we offer --1.Aadhar Card Update (Name, Address etc) 2. PVC Aadhar Card 3. Pan Card (Correction) 4.Pan Card (New) 5. Voter ID (New) 6.Voter ID (Correction) 7. Voter ID(Download) 8. GST Registration 9. GST Returns (Monthly). 10. Income Tax Return (Personal & Business). 11.CA Certification 12. GEM Registration 13. Trademark Registration 14.Trademark Registration (Company) 15.E Way Bill Registration 17.Labour License 18. PF & ESI Registration 19.Accounting Software (Vyapar). 20.Bank Account Opening(Ease @ your home) (Public & Pvt). 21 Digital Signature 22. ISO Certifications 23. Udyog Aadhar Registration 24. Company Incorporation & Registration 25. Passport Services 26. Mobile & DTH Bills (with guaranteed cash backs) & many other services....                                                                                  Regards,                                                                                                                                 Mayank Daga                                                                                                                          Verma & Co. Kolkata

* Franchise also available*
*No office space required
*Bare Minimum Investment*
